title: `make install` fails with gpgme.h file not found
body:
```bash
workspace  $ git clone git@github.com:containers/skopeo.git
Cloning into 'skopeo'...
remote: Enumerating objects: 31445, done.
remote: Counting objects: 100% (1522/1522), done.
remote: Compressing objects: 100% (944/944), done.
remote: Total 31445 (delta 534), reused 1390 (delta 490), pack-reused 29923
Receiving objects: 100% (31445/31445), 24.66 MiB | 1.05 MiB/s, done.
Resolving deltas: 100% (17308/17308), done.
workspace  $ cd skopeo
skopeo master $ make install
CGO_CFLAGS="" CGO_LDFLAGS="" GO111MODULE=on go build -mod=vendor  -ldflags '-X main.gitCommit=714ffe1b606bdcfd18b3cf746df4c3eaf5006f1b ' -gcflags "" -tags "btrfs_noversion exclude_graphdriver_btrfs libdm_no_deferred_remove" -o bin/skopeo ./cmd/skopeo
# github.com/mtrmac/gpgme
vendor/github.com/mtrmac/gpgme/data.go:4:11: fatal error: 'gpgme.h' file not found
 #include <gpgme.h>
          ^~~~~~~~~
1 error generated.
make: *** [bin/skopeo] Error 2
```

Steps to reproduce:
1. checkout latest master: ```commit 714ffe1b606bdcfd18b3cf746df4c3eaf5006f1b (HEAD -> master, origin/master, origin/HEAD)
Merge: 8efffce8 cac3f2b1
Author: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>
Date:   Wed May 26 12:41:27 2021 +0200

    Merge pull request #1297 from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/containers/common-0.39.0

    Bump github.com/containers/common from 0.38.4 to 0.39.0```
2. `make install`
